name: VOLT Sleep — Full Automation (Ideate → Create → Video → Post → Track)
notes:
Complete end-to-end content pipeline. Runs daily at 05:00 UTC.
1. Selects 3 hooks from DB (weighted, 14-day no-repeat)
2. Generates scripts via Claude AI
3. Creates TTS voiceover via OpenAI
4. Renders video via Creatomate (cloud video API)
5. Posts to TikTok, Instagram, YouTube, Facebook
6. Tracks performance and updates hook weights

parameters.jsonBody:
={{ JSON.stringify({ model: 'claude-haiku-4-5-20251001', max_tokens: 1200, messages: [{ role: 'user', content: `You are a short-form video scriptwriter for VOLT Sleep, an energy optimization app. Write a 15-30 second script.

Hook: ${$json.hook}
CTA variant: ${$json.cta_variant}

Rules: NO medical claims. Performance/energy framing. One actionable tip. Under 35 seconds spoken.

Format:
[HOOK 0-3s]
(hook)

[PROBLEM 3-8s]
(2-3 sentences)

[REFRAME 8-18s]
(insight)

[TIP 18-25s]
(action)

[CTA 25-30s]
(cta text)

---
Caption: (under 150 chars with 1 question)
Hashtags: (5 hashtags)
Thumbnail: (5 words max)
Spoken: (FULL spoken text as one paragraph, no brackets or labels)` }] }) }}

nodes.name: Generate TTS Audio (OpenAI)

parameters.jsonBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ model: 'tts-1', voice: 'nova', input: $json.spoken_text, response_format: 'mp3', speed: 1.0 }) }}

nodes.notes: Returns MP3 audio file as binary. ~$0.015 per 1000 chars.

nodes.name: Render Video (Creatomate)

parameters.jsonBody:
={{ JSON.stringify({ template_id: $env.CREATOMATE_TEMPLATE_ID || 'default', modifications: { 'Hook-Text': $json.hook, 'Problem-Text': $json.script.match(/\[PROBLEM[^\]]*\]\s*
([\s\S]*?)(?=
\[)/)?.[1]?.trim() || '', 'Reframe-Text': $json.script.match(/\[REFRAME[^\]]*\]\s*
([\s\S]*?)(?=
\[)/)?.[1]?.trim() || '', 'Tip-Text': $json.script.match(/\[TIP[^\]]*\]\s*
([\s\S]*?)(?=
\[)/)?.[1]?.trim() || '', 'CTA-Text': 'VOLT Sleep — Free. Link in bio.', 'Audio': $binary?.data ? `data:audio/mp3;base64,${$binary.data.toString('base64')}` : '', 'Background-Color': '#0a0a1a', 'Accent-Color': '#fbbf24' }, output_format: 'mp4', width: 1080, height: 1920, frame_rate: 30 }) }}

nodes.notes:
Creatomate renders video in the cloud. Alternative: use Shotstack, Bannerbear, or JSON2Video API.
Free tier: 10 renders/month. Pro: $39/mo for 200 renders.
If no Creatomate, the pipeline still saves scripts + audio for manual CapCut edit.

nodes.name: Wait for Render (Poll)
nodes.notes: Poll until status = 'succeeded'. Video URL in response.url field.

parameters.jsonBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ post_info: { title: $json.caption, privacy_level: 'PUBLIC_TO_EVERYONE' }, source_info: { source: 'PULL_FROM_URL', video_url: $json.video_url }, post_mode: 'DIRECT_POST', media_type: 'VIDEO' }) }}

parameters.subject: VOLT Content: Day {{ $json.day_number }} — 12 posts published
parameters.text:
Daily content pipeline completed.

Day: {{ $json.day_number }}
Posts: 3 scripts × 4 platforms = 12 posts
Platforms: TikTok, Instagram Reels, YouTube Shorts, Facebook Reels

Check dashboard: {{ $env.APP_URL }}/content-dashboard
